---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with the mod
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment
- **Minecraft Version**: [e.g., 1.21.1]
- **Mod Loader**: [Forge/NeoForge/Fabric]
- **Mod Loader Version**: [e.g., 51.0.22]
- **Frequent Traders Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Other Mods**: [List other installed mods]

## 📄 Logs
Please attach or link:
- Crash report (if game crashed)
- latest.log file (use pastebin or gist)

## ℹ️ Additional Context
Any other information about the problem.
